title: Ma's Fish Mould
excerpt: Ingredients 30 ml gelatine a little cold water 250 ml cream 3 x drained and flaked cans of tuna 65 ml grated onion 325 ml mayonnaise 125 ml tomato sauce 90 ml finely chopped parsley 10 ml (or more) tabasco (or you can leave it out) Method Put the gelatine in a bowl and cover with cold water. …
html:
Ingredients

  • 30 ml gelatine
  • a little cold water
  • 250 ml cream
  • 3 x drained and flaked cans of tuna
  • 65 ml grated onion
  • 325 ml mayonnaise
  • 125 ml tomato sauce
  • 90 ml finely chopped parsley
  • 10 ml (or more) tabasco (or you can leave it out)

Method

Put the gelatine in a bowl and cover with cold water. Stir and set it aside to sponge.

Heat the cream and stir in the gelatine until melted.

Pour into a mixing bowl and mix thoroughly with the rest of the ingredients.

Spoon into small bowls or moulds, or one large mould that has been sprayed with cooking spray.

Put in the fridge to set for a few hours.

Serves 8 or more as a starter with tomato salsa and crackers.

Easy!

Tip: For a smooth texture you can put the mixture in your food processor and blitz it fine. And for more texture, add about 6 finely chopped gherkins. For a lovely tang, sprinkle with coarsely chopped caper berries (capers) before serving.
